zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Burradon於大約1333年出生在英國諾圖波藍德布拉頓時，她的父親Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland34歲，母親Elizabeth de Umfreville30歲。她和Henry Tailboys至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1381年1月6日在英國諾圖波藍德享年49歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Burradon于大约1333年出生在英国諾圖波藍德布拉頓时，她的父亲Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland34岁，母亲Elizabeth de Umfreville30岁。她和Henry Tailboys至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1381年1月6日在英国諾圖波藍德享年49岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Burradon was born about 1333, in Burradon, Northumberland, England, her father, Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth de Umfreville, was 30. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Henry Tailboys. She died on 6 January 1381, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Burradon est née environ 1333, à Burradon, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Umfreville, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Henry Tailboys. Elle est décédée le 6 janvier 1381, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Burradon um 1333 in Burradon, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Umfreville 30. Sie hatte mit Henry Tailboys mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. Januar 1381 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Northumberland, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Burradon è nata il circa 1333 nel Burradon, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Umfreville, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Henry Tailboys. Morì il 6 gennaio 1381, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.Burradon, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドブラドン
ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Burradonが約1333年にイギリスノースウンバーランドブラドンで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberlandは34歳，母Elizabeth de Umfrevilleは30歳であった。彼女はHenry Tailboysとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1381年1月6日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで49歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Burradon(이)가 대략 1333년 영국 노르스벌랜드 버라던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Umfreville(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Henry Tailboys(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 1월 6일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England: Stallingborough, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Burradon nasceu aproximadamente 1333, em Burradon, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Umfreville, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Henry Tailboys. Ela faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1381, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Burradon родилась около 1333 г. в местности буррадон, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Umfreville, 30. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Henry Tailboys. Она умерла 6 января 1381 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Burradon nació aproximadamente 1333, en Burradon, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gilbert de Boroughdon Sheriff of Northumberland, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Umfreville, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Henry Tailboys. Murió el 6 de enero de 1381, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
